# BP-146 negative: the logger records only that the credential was redacted.
lang: go
file: BP-146-safe.go
variant: slog-redacted-field
---
package main

import "log/slog"

func recordLogin(password string) {
	slog.Info("login", "credential_redacted", redact(password))
}

func redact(value string) string { return "[redacted]" }
